title: pedicularis oederi subsp. multipinna
intro: Pedicularis oederi subsp. multipinna is a subspecies of the Pedicularis oederi plant, a flowering perennial native to mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pedicularis oederi subsp. multipinna include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory infections.
